text:
item 2 .
properties we employ a variety of assets in the management and operation of our rail business .
our rail network covers 23 states in the western two-thirds of the u.s .
our rail network includes 31838 route miles .
we own 26009 miles and operate on the remainder pursuant to trackage rights or leases .
the following table describes track miles at december 31 , 2013 and 2012 .
2013 2012 .


[TABLE]
|                                         |   2013 |   2012 |
|:----------------------------------------|-------:|-------:|
| route                                   |  31838 |  31868 |
| other main line                         |   6766 |   6715 |
| passing lines and turnouts              |   3167 |   3124 |
| switching and classification yard lines |   9090 |   9046 |
| total miles                             |  50861 |  50753 |
[/TABLE]

headquarters building we maintain our headquarters in omaha , nebraska .
the facility has 1.2 million square feet of space for approximately 4000 employees and is subject to a financing arrangement .
harriman dispatching center the harriman dispatching center ( hdc ) , located in omaha , nebraska , is our primary dispatching facility .
it is linked to regional dispatching and locomotive management facilities at various locations along our .
